# Secrets / local env
.env
.env.*

# VCS / editor
.git/
.github/
.idea/
.vscode/
.zed/
.fleet/
.nova/
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Dependency / build cache
node_modules/
vendor/
npm-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*

# Tests / local tooling
tests/
phpunit.xml
.phpunit.cache/
.phpunit.result.cache

# Local debug / temp
tmp/

# Runtime generated files
storage/logs/*
storage/framework/cache/*
storage/framework/sessions/*
storage/framework/views/*
bootstrap/cache/*.php

# Hot reload / local artifacts
public/hot

# Optional: large or sensitive uploads
# storage/app/private/family-avatars/*
